subcodes.first_line: This is the Leaf of Paradise that We have sent unto thee, that thou mayest render thanks unto thy Lord at eventide and at dawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه ورقه الرضوان قد ارسلناها الیک لتشکر ربک فی العشی و الابکار ان اتبع مله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @degrees of faith; certitude, @empty learning; false spirituality, @thankfulness; gratitude
